chunks.text: In the morning, I woke up earliest in my family.
To not wake up the others, I walked through the house very quietly.
I opened the door at the entrance, picked up the newspaper
and watched the morning light on the floor.
In the hall, the carpet gently took my footsteps.
In front of the mirror, I looked at my face and smiled.
My father 's car key was always placed in a small basket at the entrance.
Next to it, there was an old box full of colorful stamps.
The lamp in the living room was still softly on.
Perhaps my mother fell asleep while reading a book last night.
In the kitchen, the cups on the shelf shone in the morning sun.
I took a cup and filled it with cold water.
When I went outside, a little bird was sitting on the roof of our house.
When I opened the garage door a little, my father 's bicycle was standing quietly
